sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { FaPlane, FaClock, FaSuitcase, FaWifi, FaUtensils } from 'react-icons/fa'; import '../styles/FlightCard.css'; const FlightCard = ({ flight }) => { return (

{flight.airline}

{flight.flightNumber}

${flight.price} per person
{flight.departureTime} {flight.departure}
{flight.duration}
{flight.arrivalTime} {flight.arrival}
{flight.stops === 0 ? ( Non-stop ) : ( {flight.stops} stop(s) )}
Baggage Wi-Fi Meals
); }; export default FlightCard;
